analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet states that the United States urges respect for Kosovo’s Constitutional Court decisions and calls for free, fair, peaceful elections—promoting democratic norms and rule of law. Evaluation: US1 (honorable tradition) – Not explicitly invoking US history or legacy; no. US2 (admirable society) – No mention of US society or groups; no. US3 (hostile enemies) – No adversary framed; no. US4 (force for good) – Yes; the US is depicted as supporting human rights, rule of law, and democratic elections abroad. US5 (great international ally) – Implicitly supportive of Kosovo, but the emphasis is on norms rather than praising an ally or asserting unwavering support; weak fit, so no. US6 (at the forefront) – No leadership/primacy framing beyond a single statement; no. Conclusion: The tweet promotes US4.
